title: Harry Keyishian’s legacy: College as a ‘marketplace of ideas’ (Guest Opinion by Roy S. Gutterman)
summary: Opinion piece by Syracuse University professor Roy Gutterman discussing Harry Keyishian's legacy and the concept of colleges as marketplaces of ideas. This is an academic/cultural commentary on free speech principles at higher education institutions, not directly related to municipal governance or innovation initiatives.
processing_notes: Article focuses on higher education and free speech principles; limited direct relevance to City of Syracuse municipal operations or innovation strategy. Suggests local expertise/thought leadership available through SU faculty. No fiscal, operational, or policy implications detected for CIO portfolio.
